metadata.description: Fluid client library for gasless Stellar transactions with Web Worker support

metadata.scriptContent: tsc src/workers/signingWorker.ts --outDir dist --target ES2020 --module ESNext --lib ES2020,WebWorker,DOM

npm run native:build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-Process fluid-server -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; exit 0" && cargo build -q --manifest-path ..\fluid-server\Cargo.toml && ts-node scripts/parityCheck.ts
npm run native:build && node --test -r ts-node/register src/signing/signerPool.test.ts
